name: season
description: Time-bounded competition / training cycle. Answers 'which competitive year are we in?'. A tenant running a football academy typically has one Season per calendar year (Sep-Jun); a summer sports camp has three per year (May-Aug); a school runs one Season per academic year (Sep-Jul). Every Team, AthleteEnrollment, Event, and Session references a Season for temporal scoping - reports filter by Season for year-over-year comparisons. Small tier has this feature DISABLED entirely (Small tenants run 'always-on' scheduling without seasonal boundaries - every roster is perpetual). Medium tier allows up to 4 seasons per year; Enterprise unlimited. Exactly one is_current=true per (tenant_id, organization_id nullable, branch_id nullable, sport_key nullable) tuple - the 'active' season for that scope. Ships: Season model with lifecycle (planned -> registration_open -> in_progress -> playoffs -> completed -> archived), automatic transitions via scheduled job (RollSeasonPhaseJob), registration window enforcement middleware, one-current-per-scope-tuple invariant, plus a `TenantDefaultSeasonSeeded` listener when TenantProvisioned fires and the tenant subscribes to a business_type that uses seasonal scheduling (sports_academy / school / federation / club). Downstream: Team.season_id, AthleteEnrollment.season_id, Event.season_id, Session.season_id - all FK-referenced but only sports rows require Season; Wave 2 Team.season_id is nullable while the domain modules land.

tenant.description: Tenant-facing season CRUD + lifecycle transitions (set-current / open-registration / close-registration / start / begin-playoffs / complete / archive / restore) + the heavy-traffic current-season lookup.

platform-admin.description: Cross-tenant read for support tooling + a per-tenant seasons-summary dashboard endpoint for platform ops.
